title: Case Transfer (Zoll X Series)
content_markdown:
#### Indications

- All cases on the Zoll must be transferred at end of each shift.

#### Procedure

- Select the Log button.

Figure 1

- Select the Disclosure Log Transfer button

Figure 2

- To close the current case, press Select Key (this will allow you to include the current case in the transfer, otherwise choose continue).

- With selected cases key highlighted, click to move to list

Figure 3

- Select the cases to transfer, using the up/down arrows and select to tick (select) them

Figure 4

- Press the HOME key to move to the transfer button and then press to transfer the cases.

Figure 5

#### Troubleshooting

- **Zoll shows cases not sent** - select row and click to change and to resend.
- **Disclosure Log Transfer Failure** – Bluetooth Phone Unavailable – check iPhone Bluetooth is on, and select to retry.

Figure 6
